articles.title: Cardano Price Reclaims $1 Ahead Of White House Crypto Summit
articles.description: A breakthrough moment: Cardano's upcoming status as a part of the U.S. Fed treasury briefly puts ADA back above $1.

articles.title: Bitcoin Open Interest Crashed To 6-Month Low, Here’s What Followed The Last Time
articles.description: Crypto analyst CrediBULL Crypto has revealed that Bitcoin’s open interest has crashed to a six-month low. The analyst further explained what happened the last time this low open interest occurred while providing a bullish outlook for the flagship crypto. Bitcoin’s Open Interest Crashes To 6-Month Low In an X post, CrediBULL Crypto revealed that Bitcoin’s open interest is at the lowest levels it has been at in six months. articles.title: Why XRP and ADA don’t deserve to be on Trump’s Strategic Crypto Reserve
articles.description: Donald Trump’s Truth Social post set off a firestorm after he claimed he had directed the Presidential Working Group to move forward with a Crypto Strategic Reserve. He named Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Solana, and Cardano as part of it. That instantly raised eyebrows in the crypto world. Is the U.S. government really planning to acquire […]

articles.title: CME Group to launch Solana futures
articles.description: Solana futures will become available through CME Group starting on March 17th. The CME Group took a significant step that indicates rising institutional involvement with SOL. Investors using Solana futures under regulated markets can participate in SOL price prediction activities. If traders do this, big investors will move into the market. articles.title: Ripple prepares for what could be a $795 million XRP sale in March
articles.description: Ripple, the company behind the XRPL development and XRP’s largest token holder, is preparing its treasury for March sales. Onchain … Continue reading The post Ripple prepares for what could be a $795 million XRP sale in March appeared first on Finbold.

articles.title: Stablecoin presence key to blockchain legitimacy, says ZachXBT
articles.description: ZachXBT said major stablecoin issuers like Tether and Circle define blockchain legitimacy, while questioning the absence of stablecoins on Cardano and XRP Ledger.

articles.title: Snoop Dogg Joins Tune.FM After Blasting Spotify Payouts
articles.description: The rap legend announced on Friday that he’s moving to TuneFM, a Web3 decentralized music streaming platform and NFT marketplace built on Hedera. The move comes after Snoop publicly criticized Spotify, claiming he made very little money despite racking up over a billion streams. He said: “I don’t f*** with Spotify anymore. articles.title: Bitcoin Price Surges Nearly 10% to $95K as Trump’s Crypto Policies Boost Market Confidence
articles.description: Bitcoin price jumps 10% to $95K after Trump announces a Strategic Crypto Reserve, fueling market optimism. Will BTC hold gains or face resistance? The post Bitcoin Price Surges Nearly 10% to $95K as Trump’s Crypto Policies Boost Market Confidence appeared first on Cryptonews.

articles.title: Bybit Hackers Close to Laundering Stolen Funds, Criticism Mounts Over Delayed Response
articles.description: Bybit hackers are near completing the laundering of $1.5 billion in stolen ETH, with criticism aimed at Circle for delaying action on freezing the assets.

articles.title: Trump Announces US Crypto Reserve with XRP, Solana, and Cardano
articles.description: US President Donald Trump has announced plans for a US Crypto Strategic Reserve. Trump declared that the reserve would include XRP, Solana (SOL), and Cardano (ADA), According to today’s announcement, Trump has signed an executive order for the Digital Assets Working Group to proceed with this reserve.
